title: $ACTIVE_FIELD_FIRST
text: $ACTIVE_FIELD_FIRST Enable the video attributes defined by $ACTIVE_FIELD to take precedence over those set by $fieldvideo and fieldvideo . $ACTIVE_FIELD_FIRST { = } 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 0 Description By default, video attributes set with the $fieldvideo or fieldvideo ProcScript instructions override the attributes set by $ACTIVE_FIELD . To have $ACTIVE_FIELD take precedence, set the $ACTIVE_FIELD_FIRST assignment setting to 1 . Related Links Video Attributes Video attributes determine the Uniface index colors used in an application, and additional attributes such as bold, blink, bright and underline used character mode that can be used to highlight current fields and occurrences. $ACTIVE_FIELD Set the video attributes for the active field.
